name: condition_dedup
description: Tests whether CB creates duplicate conditions when the narrator describes the same injury across consecutive turns. Turn 1: founding premise establishes injury. Turn 2: player reaffirms the same injury. Asserts no duplicate condition was created.
world_prompt: A dense, overgrown forest path choked with brambles and thorny vines. The air is humid and still.

turns.action: I am a wanderer who just pushed through a thorny thicket. My forearms are covered in deep scratches that sting and bleed.
I look at my scratched and bleeding forearms, wincing at the stinging pain.
I examine the scratches on my arms more closely. They still sting and there's dried blood along the cuts.
